mcp_server_config.why_unavailable: The MCP server process must be started by the Claude Code host via the MCP transport layer. In the current agent session, the host did not establish a connection to the MCP server, so the tools are not registered as callable functions. The agent has only: Read, Write, Glob, Grep, SendMessage.
mcp_server_config.note: This is consistent with the previous verification test (mcp_read_verification.json) which also found all MCP tools unavailable.

=== VERDICT ===
The MCP tools cannot be called directly because the MCP server is not connected.
The equivalent live data IS available via the simulator state file and product catalog.
This is a MCP transport integration gap, not a data availability gap.
recommendation: To enable live MCP tool calls, the Claude Code host must start the MCP server process (node simulator/industrial-film-line/mcp-server.mjs) and establish stdin/stdout JSON-RPC communication with it. Alternatively, a direct node script that spawns the MCP server and makes JSON-RPC calls can be used, but Bash is not available in this agent session.
